title: Influence of Mycorrhiza on chickpea fusarium wilt
abstract: Simultaneous inoculation of Cicer arietinum with vesicular arbuscular mycorrhizal fungi (Glomus mosseae, G. constrictum and G. monosporum) and F. oxysporum f.sp. ciceris had no effect on wilt incidence in the susceptible JG 62 and resistant WR 315 genotypes. However, the wilt-tolerant genotype, K 850, had 25% wilt in soil with Fusarium + VAM, less than with Fusarium alone (35%).
